---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: DaltonR121
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the pain point or use case.

## Proposed Solution

How do you think this should work? Be as specific as you can.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why wouldn't they work?

## Additional Context

Any mockups, references to similar tools, or other context.
